w:r.w:t: draw from a centralized data pool, eliminating the restrictions of per-kit
data allotments and significantly reducing the likelihood of overage charges. This shared approach ensures greater flexibility, allows
sites to consume the data they need, and maintains operational continuity across all locations.
will receive fully managed communications services delivered by our dedicated engineering team through our 24/7 Network Operations Center (NOC). Additionally,

customer portal, providing visibility into usage reporting, metrics, and the status of all Starlink terminals under one unified platform. This centralized oversight empowers your team with the insights needed to monitor performance, manage assets efficiently, and maintain consistent connectivity across operations.

This solution delivers a more predictable cost structure, improved reliability, and a simplified method to manage all Starlink communications infrastructure. To further streamline operations, iNet can also combine all
services into a single consolidated invoice, making billing easier and reducing administrative overhead.
1. Data Pool Plan – Shared Bandwidth Model
Starlink Data Pool Plan. While comparable in monthly cost to the
model, its primary benefit is flexibility: all active Starlink terminals pull from a shared data pool rather than being restricted by individual caps.
High-usage locations can temporarily consume additional bandwidth, while lower-usage
sites draw less, maximizing efficiency and significantly reducing the likelihood of overage fees.
The third pricing section details the hardware costs for the Starlink Mini units and any requested accessories. These are
equipment purchases and are independent from the monthly service plans described above.
The pricing provided in the following table is based upon 12 Month Term.
The Pool is a monthly service for all
, serviced and monitored by iNet, with
a fixed data allotment. The Kits will share the pool and consume data as
. The Kits will not be constrained
The data pool is reset at the end of the month; unused data does not carry over into the next month.
data pool. Higher data packages are available upon request.
Pool Packages can be adjusted upon request.
the pool data allotment. The total overage fee is invoiced the following month
monthly fee per Active Starlink kit in the pool.
Will be provided after site inspection
Will be provided after site inspection
Will be provided after site inspection
“Local” service is for land based Starlink Services.
Prices may be subject to change with 30 Day notice due to SpaceX/Starlink pricing plan modifications.
If terminal is "opted in" overages will be added at 50GB increments.
If terminal is "opted out", upon exceeded allotted subscription, terminal will be throttled at 1024 kbps down and 512 kbps up.
Automatic 50Gb overages blocks will not change subscription and will not repeat unless subscription allotment is exceeded in that month.
All plan changes take effect on the 1
day of the month following the change.
Pricing for Pool for Starlink Service is based upon a 12 Month Term upon date of agreement between both parties.
Term for individual Kits is specific to individual Service Order of that kit.
Starlink reserves the right to modify its pricing at any time with 30 days’ notice prior to the change taking effect.
This quote is valid for 30 days from creation date
Pricing is exclusive of all civil works, applicable taxes or tariffs,
Shipping is FOB unless otherwise stated in this proposal.
Payment terms NET 30 days from invoice date unless stated otherwise in Master Service Agreement
